full_text:
Fan Ling (Deyun) 樊陵 (德雲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Ling (樊陵), styledDeyun (德雲), was born in Nanyang. Appointed by the eunuchs after He Jin’s death but was executed by Yuan Shao. Fan Ling was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Fan Ling lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
